description: Complete polyglot quality, security, reproducibility, provenance, packaging, and staged-release automation.

gates.evidence: Install and authorize the Renovate GitHub App, then observe its dashboard and one checked update PR before disabling Dependabot security updates.
GitHub retained non-provider pattern and validity-check settings as disabled after two API enable attempts; retain as an entitlement-dependent gate.
Signing and publishing require authorized credentials and exact release approval.
Registry acceptance is external to repository readiness.
